name: Yummy Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Minced red or white onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together in a container.
2. Let sit for at least one hour to allow flavors to meld.
The mixture was processed through a food processor, making preparation quick and easy. It was enjoyed immediately that night, with reports of improved flavor over the next couple of days.
